    f.CDSCode, 
    f.School Name, 
    f.County Name, 
    f.District Name, 
    f.School Type, 
    f.FRPM Count (K-12), 
    f.Enrollment (K-12), 
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)] AS EligibleFreeRate,
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12)] AS EligibleFRPMRate
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.[Ownership Code] = '66'
ORDER BY 
    f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] DESC;

28:
WITH AverageDifference AS (
    SELECT AVG(Enrollment("K-12") - Enrollment("Ages 5-17")) AS avg_diff
    FROM frpm
    JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
    WHERE FundingType = 'Local'
),
FilteredSchools AS (
    SELECT schools.School, schools.DOC, schools.DOCType
    FROM frpm
    JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
    WHERE FundingType = 'Local'
      AND frpm.Enrollment("K-12") - frpm.Enrollment("Ages 5-17") > (SELECT avg_diff FROM AverageDifference)
)
SELECT * FROM FilteredSchools;

    s.Zip,
    s.Website,
    s.Latitude,
    s.Longitude,
    s.OpenDate,
    s.ClosedDate,

    (SELECT MAX(d.A11) FROM client c JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id WHERE c.gender = 'F') AS max_salary,

SELECT 
    ((T1.balance - T2.balance) / T2.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    trans AS T1
JOIN 
    account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
WHERE 
    T1.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27'
    AND T2.account_id IN (
        SELECT 
            T2.account_id
        FROM 
            loan AS T2
        JOIN 
            account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
        WHERE 
            T2.date = '1993-07-05'
    )
169:
SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T4.date) = 1997 THEN T4.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T4.date) = 1996 THEN T4.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T4.date) = 1996 THEN T4.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
INNER JOIN 
    account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
INNER JOIN 
    loan AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id
WHERE 
    T1.gender = 'M' AND T1.birth_date BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1997-12-31';

120:
SELECT a.account_id, COUNT(t.trans_id) AS frequency_of_statement_issuance
FROM account a
JOIN client c ON a.account_id = c.account_id
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
LEFT JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'east Bohemia'
AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM a.date) BETWEEN 1995 AND 2000
GROUP BY a.account_id;
